if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
ca.grp_cd LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
ca.grp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_comp_auth ca WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT count(1) FROM ( SELECT * FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_comp_auth ca ON ca.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND ca.grp_cd = #{searchCd} WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY ca.menu_seq, sm.menu_id, sm.up_menu_id, sm.menu_nm ) AS grouped_results;

SELECT ca.created_at, ca.updated_at, #{searchCd} AS grp_cd, sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, COALESCE(ca.del_ah, 'N') as del_ah, COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, 'N') as exl_ah, COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, 'N') as sav_ah, CASE WHEN count(ca.*) > 0 THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END AS cmd FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_menu ca ON ca.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND ca.grp_id = #{grpId} AND ca.comp_id = #{compId}
AND ca.param='W'
AND ca.param='A'
INNER JOIN esg.tb_comp_auth tc ON tc.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND tc.grp_cd = 'USER'
AND tc.param='W'
AND tc.param='A'
WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY ca.created_at, ca.updated_at, ca.del_ah, ca.exl_ah, ca.sav_ah, sm.menu_id, sm.up_menu_id, sm.menu_nm ORDER BY sm.menu_odr

SELECT DISTINCT sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.router_nm, sm.menu_nm_eng, sm.router_path, sm.view_path, sm.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr,
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah,
'U' AS cmd, COALESCE(tc.del_ah, 'N') AS del_ah, COALESCE(tc.exl_ah, 'N') AS exl_ah, COALESCE(tc.sav_ah, 'N') AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm
CASE WHEN thr.menu_id IS NOT NULL AND (thr.del_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, NULL)) OR thr.exl_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, NULL)) OR thr.sav_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, NULL)) OR thr.sch_ah='N') THEN 'U'
WHEN count(ca.*) > 0 THEN 'G'
ELSE 'I' END AS cmd,
CASE WHEN thr.del_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.del_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS del_ah, CASE WHEN thr.exl_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.exl_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS exl_ah, CASE WHEN thr.sav_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.sav_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_menu ca ON ca.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND ca.comp_id = #{compId} AND ca.grp_id = #{grpId}
AND ca.param='W'
AND ca.param='A'
AND ca.grp_id in
#{id}
CASE WHEN thr.menu_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'
ELSE 'I' END AS cmd,
COALESCE(thr.del_ah, 'N') AS del_ah, COALESCE(thr.exl_ah, 'N') AS exl_ah, COALESCE(thr.sav_ah, 'N') AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_menu ca ON 1=0
INNER JOIN esg.tb_comp_auth tc ON tc.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND tc.grp_cd = #{userRole}
AND tc.param='W'
AND tc.param='A'
LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_menu thr ON thr.comp_id = #{compId} AND thr.hr_id = #{hrId} AND sm.menu_id = thr.menu_id WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.router_nm, sm.menu_nm_eng, sm.router_path, sm.view_path, sm.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr, thr.menu_id, thr.del_ah, thr.exl_ah, thr.sav_ah, thr.sch_ah ORDER BY sm.menu_odr

SELECT
#{searchCd} AS grp_cd, sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, COALESCE(ca.del_ah, 'N') as del_ah, COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, 'N') as exl_ah, COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, 'N') as sav_ah, CASE WHEN count(ca.*) > 0 THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END AS cmd FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_comp_auth ca ON ca.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND ca.grp_cd = #{searchCd}
AND ca.param='W'
AND ca.param='A' WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY ca.menu_seq, sm.menu_id, sm.up_menu_id, sm.menu_nm ORDER BY sm.menu_odr

SELECT
ca.grp_cd, ca.menu_id, 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_comp_auth ca WHERE ca.menu_seq = #{menuSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_comp_auth ( grp_cd, menu_id, sav_ah, del_ah, exl_ah, param, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{grpCd}, #{menuId}, #{savAh}, #{delAh}, #{exlAh}, #{param}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_group_menu ( comp_id, grp_id, menu_id, sav_ah, del_ah, exl_ah, param, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{grpId}, #{menuId}, #{savAh}, #{delAh}, #{exlAh}, #{param}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_hr_menu ( comp_id, hr_id, menu_id, sch_ah, sav_ah, del_ah, exl_ah, param, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{hrId}, #{menuId}, #{schAh}, #{savAh}, #{delAh}, #{exlAh}, #{param}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_comp_auth SET grp_cd = #{grpCd}, menu_id = #{menuId}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE menu_seq = #{menuSeq}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM esg.tb_group_menu WHERE grp_id = #{grpId} AND comp_id = #{compId}
DELETE FROM esg.tb_group_menu WHERE grp_id = #{grpId} AND comp_id = #{compId} AND param = #{param}
DELETE FROM esg.tb_hr_menu WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} AND comp_id = #{compId} AND param = #{param}
